description: Manifest of GitHub Releases for HyperTensor pre-computed model artefacts. Each entry is a release tag on github.com/NagusameCS/HyperTensor with cache files attached.

releases.title: Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct Q4_K_M, GRC k=1024
releases.performance_notes: Super-baseline configuration: 106.27% of baseline decode throughput at +61.4% perplexity; throughput-quality trade-off, see Paper A Sec 4.

releases.title: Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct Q4_K_M, GRC k=1536 (headline)
releases.performance_notes: Headline config: throughput indistinguishable from baseline (97.55%, p=0.48) at +13.30% perplexity (6.79 -> 7.69).

releases.title: Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct Q4_K_M, GRC k=1280
releases.performance_notes: Intermediate rank used in the multi-k NCU sweep (Paper A Sec sec:falsification). Not on the headline path.

releases.title: SmolLM2-135M-Instruct Q8_0, GRC k=512
releases.performance_notes: Cross-model transfer check: 1.45x decode ratio vs uncompressed (Paper A sec:cross-model).

releases.title: Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct Q4_K_M, OTT hidden-state warm-start
releases.performance_notes: Pre-warmed one-decode hidden state for OTT/GTC verifier. Used by Paper D speculative decoding warm-start.

notes: asset_sha256_local fields are placeholders; the actual SHA256 is computed at upload time via scripts/paperA_proof/publish_releases.ps1 and recorded against the release asset on GitHub.

Each release page on github.com/NagusameCS/HyperTensor/releases includes the SHA256, exact base-model commit hash, rank, peak VRAM during build, peak VRAM during decode, build time, runtime version, and binary commit hash.
The cache file format is documented in runtime/nn/axiom_exploit.c (search for AXEX_WPROJ_MAGIC, value 0x3130564A4F525057).

To use a released cache: download the .bin, place it in the working directory of geodessical, and the runtime will load it automatically on the next compatible (--axex-compress --axex-compress-rank K) invocation.
